snippet.title: YABI - TIMI HO
snippet.description:
Written & performed by YABI THE G.O.A.T
Recorded at Kadak Nepali Records
Mixing & Mastering by Ruthlex
 
Get connected

YABI : https://www.instagram.com/yabi_the_g.o.a.t?igsh=MzE0anFmemF0bXV6&utm_source=qr

kADAK NEPALI RECORDS: https://www.instagram.com/kadaknepali?igsh=cDVoNW82NmIxbWY1

Ruthlex: https://www.instagram.com/ruthlexx_np?igsh=OHJ3djdvM3NmcHpz


â€œTimi Hoâ€‌  the 4th track from my mixtape Boomerang is finally here. This song is about real connection, loyalty, and the one person who becomes your strength when everything else feels uncertain. Sometimes in life, no matter how far things go, the right energy always comes back to you like a boomerang.
Thank you to everyone who keeps supporting the journey and believing in the music. This one is from the heart.

â€œTimi Hoâ€‌ is now streaming on all platforms.

snippet.title: Bhooth Bangla -Official Teaser | Akshay Kumar, Tabu, Paresh, Wamiqa, Priyadarshan |In Cinemas 10 Apr
snippet.description:
Laughter, screams, and surprises are waiting inside the Bangla. Dare to enter? ًں¤£ًں§ںâ€چâ™€ï¸ڈ
#BhoothBanglaTeaser out now!

#BhoothBangla in cinemas on 10th April 2026 ًں‘»

Bhooth Bangla reunites #AkshayKumar with acclaimed director #Priyadarshan after 14 years, promising a delightful blend of comedy, horror, and thrill.

Balaji Telefilms Ltd. in association with Cape Of Good Films present
Bhooth Bangla

Starring: Akshay Kumar, Paresh Rawal, Rajpal Yadav, Tabu, Wamiqa Gabbi, Jisshu Sengupta, Manoj Joshi, Mithila Palkar, Asrani Ji, Rajesh Sharma 
Directed by: Priyadarshan
Produced by: Akshay Kumar, Shobha Kapoor, Ektaa R. Kapoor
Co-producer: Vimal Doshi, Farahjaan Sheikh, Vedant Vikaas Baali
Group CEO & CFO (BTL): Sanjay Dwivedi

Lyrics: Yitendra Mishra & Kumaar

Editor: Aiyappan Nair M.S

snippet.title: Dhurandhar The Revenge Official Hindi Trailer | Ranveer S | Aditya D | In Cinemas 19 March 2026
snippet.description:
Ab Pakistan ka mustakbil, Hindustan tay karega
Dhurandhar The Revenge Trailer Out Now.  Book Now for Paid Previews on 18th March only.

Releasing worldwide on 19 March, on Gudi Padwa, Ugadi, and Eid.

Jio Studios presents
A B62 Studios Production

An Aditya Dhar Film
DHURANDHAR THE REVENGE 

Written, Directed and Produced by Aditya Dhar
Produced by Jyoti Deshpande
Produced by Lokesh Dhar

Trailer Scored, Composed and Produced by Shashwat Sachdev

Ari Ari Song Credits: 
Composed, Arranged and Programmed by Shashwat Sachdev
Vocals: Navtej Singh Rehal (Bombay Rockers), Khan Saab, Jasmine Sandlas & Sudhir Yaduvanshi
Rap Performed and written by Reble, Token 
Lyrics by Irshad Kamil, Bombay Rockers
Score Producer Adam Lucas
Music Supervisor: Adarsh Vishwakarma

Director of Photography - Vikash Nowlakha
Editor: Shivkumar V. Panicker
Music and Background Score: Shashwat Sachdev
Casting Director: Mukesh Chhabra, CSA
Executive Producer: Rahul H. Gandhi
Character & Prosthetics Designer: Preetisheel Singh Dâ€™Souza
Sound Designer: Bishwadeep Chatterjee
Costume Designer: Smriti Chauhan
Action Directors: Aejaz Gulab, Sea Young Oh, Yannick Ben, Ramazan Bulut
Choreographer: Vijay Ganguly
Additional Screenplay: Shivkumar V. Panicker, Ojas Gautam
Additional Production Designer: Rupin Suchak
Associate Director & Second Unit Director: Rohun Rege
Chief Assistant Director: Sameer Sadhwani
Directorâ€™s Assistant: Ojas Gautam
Creative Producer: Aarsh Vora
Assistant Producer: Shweta Vora
Line Producer: Naseer Ahmed Khan
Research Consultant: Aditya Raj Kaul, Dibya S.
Associate Editor: Sumit Dhole, Juhi Gopalakrishnan
Marketing Manager: Chelsea Gupta
Production Sound Mixers: Manas Bal, Prabal Pradhan
Post Producer: Gautmik
Re-Recording Mixer: Justin Jose K (CAS)
VFX Supervisor: Dhruti Ranjan Sahoo
VFX Studios: Envision VFX, Philm CGI, Redefine, R2 VFX
DI Studio: Redefine
DI Colourist: Ashirwad Hadkar (ISC)
Digital Agency: White Rivers Media
PR Agency: Communique Film PR
Marketing Agency: MAX Marketing Ltd
Teaser and Trailer Editor: Ojas Gautam
Dubbing & Localization: Annapurna Studios
Visual Promotion: Jayesh Shikarkhane & Team
Publicity Design: Ma & Th (Marching Ants & Trigger Happy)

Jio Studios Team
COO & CFO: Priyanka Chaudhary
CEO Production and Distribution: Deepak Sharma
Chief Legal Officer: Dipti Kotak
PR Head: Amita Naidu

Dhurandhar The Revenge introduces Jaskirat Singh Rangi, tracing the chain of events that compel him to become Hamza Ali Mazari, and follows his rise as he operates deep inside Pakistan. The film is set to return this time in Hindi, Telugu, Tamil, Kannada and Malayalam.

19 March 2026
In Cinemas Worldwide
A Jio Studios Release

PR Head: Amita Naidu

Dhurandhar The Revenge introduces Jaskirat Singh Rangi, tracing the chain of events that compel him to become Hamza Ali Mazari, and follows his rise as he operates deep inside Pakistan. The film is set to return this time in Hindi, Telugu, Tamil, Kannada and Malayalam.

19 March 2026
In Cinemas Worldwide
A Jio Studios Release

snippet.title: Sanam Teri Kasam - 8K/4K Music Video | Harshvardhan Rane | Himesh Reshammiya | Ankit Tiwari, Palak M
snippet.description:
Relive the timeless romance with the stunning 8K/4K music video of "Sanam Teri Kasam" from the movie Sanam Teri Kasam. Featuring the heartfelt chemistry of Harshvardhan Rane and Mawra Hocane, this soulful track is beautifully composed by Himesh Reshammiya and sung by Ankit Tiwari and Palak Muchhal.

#sanamterikasam #8k #8kvideo #harshvardhanrane #mawrahocane #ankittiwari #palakmuchhal #himeshreshammiya 

Description:
Song - Sanam Teri Kasam
Singer - Ankit Tiwari, Palak Muchhal
Composer - Himesh Reshammiya
Lyricist - Himesh Reshammiya, Sameer Anjaan

Lyrics:
Betahasha dil ne
Tujhko hi chaaha hai
Har duaa mein maine
Tujhko hi maanga hai

Tera jaana jaise koi baddua
Tera jaana jaise koi baddua
Door jaaoge jo tum
Mar jaayenge hum
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam..

Tumhe dekhte hi aankhen ho jaati namm
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam..

Huaa ye kya hashar mera
Judaa huaa sabar mera
Main tere bin ek lamha
Kyun kabhi naa jiya

Raat bhar ashqo ne tujhko pukara hai
Har dua main maine tujhko hi maanga hai

Tera jaana jaise koi baddua
Door jaaoge jo tum
Mar jaayenge hum
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam..

Tumhe dekhte hi aankhen ho jaati nam
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam...

Nasha tera dil ko lagaa
Dena nahi mujhko dagaa
Main teri aadat ka maara
Hai kya meri khataa

Tere bin naamumkin
Apna guzaara hai
Har duaa mein maine
Tujhko hi maanga hai

Tera jaana jaise koi baddua
Door jaaoge jo tum
Mar jaayenge hum
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam..

Tumhe dekhte hi aakhen ho jaati nam
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam..

This video was inspired by the story of seven young Koreans as documented in The Washington Post on May 8, 1896 (â€œSeven Koreans at Howardâ€‌), some of whom captured the first known audio recordings of Koreans in Washington, D.C., on July 24 of that same year. As a modern reimagining, this work draws upon the profound cultural significance of these historical records, which preserve the authentic voices of young Korean men and the first-ever recording of â€œArirang.â€‌ This production may deviate from actual historical events and does not serve as a formal evaluation or interpretation of any historical event or person.

This video was inspired by the story of seven young Koreans as documented in The Washington Post on May 8, 1896 (â€œSeven Koreans at Howardâ€‌), some of whom captured the first known audio recordings of Koreans in Washington, D.C., on July 24 of that same year. As a modern reimagining, this work draws upon the profound cultural significance of these historical records, which preserve the authentic voices of young Korean men and the first-ever recording of â€œArirang.â€‌ This production may deviate from actual historical events and does not serve as a formal evaluation or interpretation of any historical event or person.

snippet.title: Bairan â€“ Animated Love Story | Banjaare (Official Video)
snippet.description:
Bairan was never meant to be a hit.

We made Bairan for hearts, not for trends, not for reels, not for charts

No label. No big budget. Just two Brothers and a feeling.

We shot a real music video in Chandigarh.
We trusted the wrong person.
And received cheap quality.
That video almost destroyed this song.
So we cancelled everything.
We uploaded only the audio through DistroKid, with no marketing, no plans.
Then something magical happened.
YouTube algorithm picked Bairan.
People started listening.
People started feeling it.
People made it viral.
And suddenly, Bairan was no longer OUR song.
It became YOUR song.
Thatâ€™s why we decided to create this animated music video.
Because when characters are animated, everyone can see themselves in the story.
Every broken heart becomes the hero.
Every lover becomes the character.

This video is dedicated to every person who felt Bairan.
This is your story.
This is your song.


Song Credits: 
Title: Bairan
Singer/Lyricist/Composer: BANJAARE
Music: Roni
Mix-Master: Gurie
Animation : Ham_mah.10

Special Thanks To - Jayant Kamboj , Rajkumari

hi.title: Bairan â€“ Animated Love Story | Banjaare (Official Video)
hi.description:
Bairan was never meant to be a hit.

We made Bairan for hearts, not for trends, not for reels, not for charts

No label. No big budget. Just two Brothers and a feeling.

We shot a real music video in Chandigarh.
We trusted the wrong person.
And received cheap quality.
That video almost destroyed this song.
So we cancelled everything.
We uploaded only the audio through DistroKid, with no marketing, no plans.
Then something magical happened.
YouTube algorithm picked Bairan.
People started listening.
People started feeling it.
People made it viral.
And suddenly, Bairan was no longer OUR song.
It became YOUR song.
Thatâ€™s why we decided to create this animated music video.
Because when characters are animated, everyone can see themselves in the story.
Every broken heart becomes the hero.
Every lover becomes the character.

This video is dedicated to every person who felt Bairan.
This is your story.
This is your song.


Song Credits: 
Title: Bairan
Singer/Lyricist/Composer: BANJAARE
Music: Roni
Mix-Master: Gurie
Animation : Ham_mah.10

Special Thanks To - Jayant Kamboj , Rajkumari

snippet.title: Ustaad Bhagat Singh Trailer | Pawan Kalyan | Harish Shankar | Sreeleela | Raashii Khanna
snippet.description:
Ustaad Bhagat Singh Trailer on @MythriMovieMakers 

Ustaad Bhagat Singh is an Upcoming Telugu movie ft. Pawan Kalyan, Sreeleela, Raashii Khanna & others. Music composed by Rockstar Devi Sri Prasad, Written and Directed by Harish Shankar.S. Produced by Naveen Yerneni and Y. Ravi Shankar under Mythri Movie Makers Banner.

In Cinemas March 19th, 2026.

#UstaadBhagatSinghTrailer #UstaadBhagatSingh #PawanKalyan #HarishShankar #Sreeleela #RaashiiKhanna #DeviSriPrasad #DSP #NaveenYerneni #RaviShankar #MythriMovieMakers

Cast & Crew Details :

Cast: Pawan Kalyan, Sreeleela, Raashii Khanna, Parthiban & Others

Technical Crew:
Written & Directed by: Harish Shankar.S
Producers: Naveen Yerneni, Ravi Shankar Yalamanchili
Music: Devi Sri Prasad
Background Score: Thaman S
Screenplay: K Dasharath, Ramesh Reddy
Additional writing: Praveen Varma and Chandramohan.
Editing: Karthika Srinivas 
Production Designer: Anand Sai 
CEO: Cherry
Executive Producers: R Chandrasekhar, Dinesh Narasimhan 
Creative Producer: Harish Pai 
Fights : Ram Laxman, Nabakanth, Prudhvi 
Costume Designer(Pawan Kalyan): Neeta Lulla
DI & Sound Mix: Annapurna Studios
Mix Engineer: Kannan Ganpat
Colorist: Venu Gopal Rao J
Marketing: First show
PRO: Venu Gopal

Ustaad Bhagat Singh Trailer Tease: https://youtu.be/MehJ4bDdicQ

snippet.title: Bhooth Bangla Teaser REVIEW | Deeksha Sharma
snippet.description:
Bhooth Bangla Teaser Review By Deeksha Sharma. Akshay Kumar with Director Priyadarshan is set for Bhooth Bangla Franchise with Tabu & Wamiqa Gabbi in Mysterious Roles of Horror Comedy & Suspense- Bhooth Bangla Teaser is pure Nostalgia of Bhool Bhulaiyaa but falls short in editing & establishing connection of Old Characters in new story. Bhooth Bangla Teaser Trailer Reaction & Full Movie Expectation would be shared in this Video. Can Akshay Kumar challenge Kartik Aaryan for OG Horror Comedy Franchise? Do leave Comments below now!

snippet.title: Ganga Ke Kinare | Bunny | Sagar | Kripa Record
snippet.description:
Kripa Record Presents "Ganga Ke Kinare"

Singer - Bunny & Sagar
Music & Compose - Bunny 
Lyrics - Sagar 
Flute - Kiran Vinkar
Mix & Master - Hanish Taneja

Featuring - Dimpy Negi
Director - Alex
Creative Director & DOP - Arshad
Editor - Zipsi
Colourist - Onkar
VFX - Ronak Bindra and Aman Singh bhakuni 
BTS - Shubham rana 
Camera Assitant - Golu
Sagar & Bunny Makeup & Hair - Viren 
Dimpy makeup & Hair - Sonakshi & Isha 
Choreographer - Chinu
Foreigners Coordinator - Chinu & Vijay Rawat
Dimpy Costume - Nandini Fashion ( Lehnga )
Camera & Light- Y-Series Production Lights 
Gaffer - Sunil 
Drone - Shanky 

Special thanks - Parmarth Niketan Ashram

Team Kripa Record - Ankita

Digital Distribution - Universal Music
Project Head - Sahil Sharma 

Lyrics: 

Chaand ko niharu
Shiv Jo pukaru x2
Ganga ke kinaare baith ke 
Baith keâ€¦
Ganga ke kinaare 
baith ke 

Rooh ko sawaru 
Aarti utaaru
Ganga ke kinaare baith ke x2
Baith keâ€¦. 

Hum toh hmare hi jeevan se hai itne 
Sataaye hue 
Toote hain bikhre hain hum toh 
Sabke bhulaye hue 

Kehte hain aaye jo 
Ganga nahaye 
Har jaate hain sab log 
Ab humne samjha hai 
Ab humne jana 
Kyu ganga aate hain log 

Thakk gaye the hum 
Dukhon ko utha ke 
Ab chain ayaaa 
Aayi ab saansain
Ganga ke kinaare baith ke 
Baith ke â€¦. X2 

Kyu roye har baat me bandeya 
Kya laya tha sath me bandeya 
Jaane de jo chala gaya hai 
Kuch bi nai tere hath me bandeya  

Man nahi bharta 
Jitna bi taakain
Itna sukoon hain 
Bhar gayi aankhain
Ganga ke kinaare bath keâ€¦
 
Ganga dharaye shivaye Ganga dharaye 
Har har bole namah shivaye..

Reach us at: Kriparecordsindia@gmail.com

(c) Universal Music Group

â–؛ About Kripa Record:

"Kripa Record" is a devotional music label dedicated to producing and promoting spiritual music that inspires profound experiences. "Kripa" meaning "grace" in Sanskrit, reflects the essence of divine mercy in the label's music. Kripaâ€™s diverse devotional music is crafted by renowned artists, invoking peace, reverence, and spiritual awakening. It will serve as a cherished companion for meditation, prayer, and reflection.

snippet.title: Lauv - I Like Me Better
snippet.description:
Lauv - I Like Me Better

(Lyrics)
[Verse 1]
To be young and in love in New York City
To not know who I am but still know that I'm good long as you're here with me
To be drunk and in love in New York City
Midnight into morning coffee
Burnin' through the hours talkin' (Damn)

[Chorus]
I like me better when I'm with you
I like me better when I'm with you
I knew from the first time
I'd stay for a long time 'cause
I like me better when
I like me better when I'm with you

[Drop]

[Verse 2]
I don't know what it is, but I got that feelin'
Wakin' up in this bed next to you, swear the room, yeah, it got no ceilin'
If we lay, let the day just pass us by
I might get to too much talkin'
I might have to tell you somethin' (Damn)

[Chorus]
I like me better when I'm with you
I like me better when I'm with you
I knew from the first time
I'd stay for a long time 'cause
I like me better when
I like me better when I'm with you

[Drop]

[Bridge]
Stay awhile, stay awhile, stay here with me
Stay awhile, stay awhile, oh
Stay awhile, stay awhile, stay here with me
Lay here with me, ayy, ayy, ooh

[Chorus]
I like me better when I'm with you (Yes, I do, yes, I do, baby)
I like me better when I'm with you (Oh no)
I knew from the first time
I'd stay for a long time 'cause
I like me better when
I like me better when I'm with you

[Outro]
(I like me, I like me)
(Look who you made me, made me, oh no)
Better when
I like me better when I'm with you

Tags:
I Like Me Better Lyrics
Lauv I Like Me Better
I Like Me Better Lauv
Stay awhile stay awhile stay here with me
Lay here with me ayy ayy ooh
I like me better when I'm with you
I like me better
When I'm with you
I knew from the first time
I'd stay for a long time 'cause
I like me better when
I like me better when I am with you
I Like Me Better

#Lauv #ILikeMeBetter #Lyrics

snippet.title: [Hindi] BGIS 2026 | SEMI FINALS | Day 4 #BGMILIVE #BGIS
snippet.description:
The SEMI FINALS of BGIS 2026 begin.

The competition tightens. The stakes rise. There is no margin for error now.

After battling through The Grind, Round stages, Quarter Finals and Wildcard, only the strongest remain. Every match carries weight. Every fight moves teams one step closer to the Grand Finals.

This is where contenders turn into finalists.

Watch the SEMI FINALS live and witness who takes the next step toward the championship stage.

Follow us on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/kraftonindiaesports/
Follow us on X: https://x.com/KIEOFFICIAL_
Join our official Discord server: https://discord.gg/P53etCn5ve

#BGIS2026 #BreakingBoundaries #BGMILIVE #KraftonIndiaEsports #BGMI

snippet.description:
Raam Naam Satya Movie Trailer | Biraj Bhatta, Sushil Shrestha | Ram Naam Satya Teaser 

Directed: Michael Chand 
Produced: Kishor Bhatt, Rajendra Bhatt, and Arjun Sunar
Release: Chaitra 27 (2082

Biraj Bhatta, Sushil Shrestha, Supushpa Bhatta, Ayush Singh Thakuri, Divya Rayamajhi, Prashant Tamrakar, and Sunil Thapa. This film marks the acting debut of TikToker Aayush Singh Thakuri.

Farki aideu priya, bato moder

Nafarkine gari gayau, maile chahera ni rokna sakin

snippet.title: Countries Decide Who Wins $25,000
snippet.description:
I canâ€™t believe who they chose

This might be the coolest thing we've ever made! Go check out the new Feastables x Super Mario Galaxy Movie products at Kroger, 7Eleven, Five Below, and Walmart locations nationwide ًںڑ€ https://fstbls.com/5mj6dv

We invited a bunch of countries and nations across the world to decide who should win $25,000 based off those that typically compete in the Olympics. However, we did accidentally label SpeedSilver as United Kingdom when we meant to have him as England, sorry SpeedSilver!

We did our best recreating the world map in Minecraft as close as possible to real life, but due to size restrictions in game so it didn't take an hour to cross the map it may not be entirely 1:1 so there may be some unintentional inconsistencies in the terrain and generation of the in game world map

snippet.title: Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Hunters
snippet.description:
Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Hunters. You asked for it. The continuation of the series. This was absolutely insane.

Follow my socials:
â‍½ Twitter - @dream
â‍½ Instagram - @dreamwastaken
â‍½ Snapchat - @dreampublic

Merch: https://dream.shop

BadBoyHalo: @thesaintsofgames 
George: @GeorgeNotFound 
Sapnap: @Sapnap 
Antfrost: @Antfrost 
awesamdude: @awesamdude 
CaptainPuffy: @CaptainPuffy 

We decided to call this series Minecraft Manhunt. This video is a different rendition of it, where there are SIX hunters instead of THREE hunters or just one.

This is a new Minecraft but, 1.21.11 challenge that we have decided to try. I try to beat the game, while my friend George AND my friend Sapnap AND my friend BadBoyHalo AND my friend Antfrost AND my friend awesamdude AND my friend CaptainPuffy tries to prevent me from doing it. It's a race, and it's super intense and we had a lot of laughs. I love doing these challenges.

If this video gets 500,000 likes we'll do a rematch!

Not Minecraft, But Water Rises or Minecraft, But Lava Rises, or any other but challenge like that. This is a speed run / speed runner of Minecraft against a killer / assassin

#MinecraftManhunt

fil.description:
Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Hunters. Ginusto niyo ito. Pagpatuloy ito ng series.  Ito ay grabi lang.
â€ژ
â€ژFollow ang socials ko:
â€ژâ‍½ Twitter - @Dream
â€ژâ‍½ Instagram - @Dreamwastaken
â€ژâ‍½ Snapchat - @Dreampublic

â€ژ

â€ژGeorge:  @GeorgeNotFound
â€ژSapnap:  @Sapnap
â€ژAntfrost:  @Antfrost
â€ژawesamdude:  @awesamdude
â€ژCaptainPuffy:  @CaptainPuffy
â€ژ
â€ژDesisyon namin tawagin tong series na Minecraft Manhunt. Sa video na ito ay iba ang rendisyon, kung saan meron ANIM na hunters hindi TATLONG hunters o Isa lang. 
â€ژ
â€ژ
â€ژ
â€ژIto ay bagong minecraft, pero, 1.21.11 challenge na desisyon namin to i-try. Tri-ny ko tapusin ang laro habang ang mga kaibigan ko sila George AT sila Saptap AT sila BadBoyHalo at sila Antfrost AT sila Awesamdude at sila CaptainPuffy ay try akong iwasan sa pag gawa nun. Ito ay karera, and grabi ang intense an dami namin tawanan. Mahilig ako sa mga ganitong challenges. 
â€ژ
â€ژPag itong video ay umabot ng 500,000 likes at baka mag rematch! 
â€ژ
â€ژHindi minecraft, Pero ang tubig ay tumataas, o Minecraft Pero Lava tumataas, o kahit anong challenges basta ganun.  Ito as speed run / speedrunner ng Minecraft against sa Killer / assassin

Ich versuche, das Spiel zu besiegen, wأ¤hrend mein Freund George UND mein Freund Sapnap UND mein Freund BadBoyHalo UND mein Freund Antfrost UND mein Freund Awesamdude UND meine Freundin CpatainPuffy versuchen, mich daran zu hindern. snippet.title: VEK X @swar5729 - SWAR | Prod by pozod
snippet.description:
Final stop. Final energy. Final chapter of a journey weâ€™ll never forget.
ClassX Rush Live Final EP

Vek âœ–ï¸ڈ Swar â€” two voices, one stage, one powerful moment.
This is not just a live session, this is the closing of a story built with passion, pressure, practice, and pure love for music.

From the first beat to the last note, this final episode carries everything we believe in  raw performance, real emotion, and real connection with the crowd.
No filters. No shortcuts. Just music, movement, and memories made on stage.

Thank you to everyone who supported the journey, watched every episode, shared the clips, and believed in what we are building.
This one is for the culture.
This one is for the grind.
This one is for the people who never stopped listening.

PROD mix master : Pozod
KEYS : santosh tamang
Written & Composed : Swapnil Sharma
Shot by : ZAY & Acies ( Aurora production )

snippet.description:
Navjot Ahuja - Khat 
Stream/Download:

~ MUSIC INFO ~ 
Recorded by Solo, Jay
Mixed, Mastered by Mukul Jain (Ferris Wheel Studios)
Instagram - @ferriswheelstudios

Guitars - Mehul Sharma 
Keys - Kanishk Diwakar
Bass Guitars- Himanshu

 ~Lyrics ~ Navjot Ahuja - Khat
Kaagaz ke phool laau tere liye
Khat likhu tere liye
Mai khuda me maanu nahi
Par maangu dua tere liye

Tere liye ghar banaau
Deewaarein neele rang se sajaau
Pasand hai tumhe, maloom hai
Tumne bataya tha ekâپںdafe

Neeleâپںphoolâپںlaau tere liye
Khatâپںlikhu tere liye
Maiâپںkhuda me maanu nahi
Par maangu dua tere liye

Teri baatein nasamajh si phir bhi jaayaz lag rahi hai
Tu pareshan kar rahi hai phir bhi masoom lag rahi hai
Tere liye mandir jaaun
Tere naam ka dia jalaaun
Hasta rahe tu chaahe jo ho
Tذµri hasi ko nazar na lage

Kaagaz ke phool laau terذµ liye
Khat likhu tere liye
Mai khuda me maanu nahi
Par maangu dua tere liyeâ€¦

Tere liye hum bane hai
Tere liye badal rahe hai
Kya mohabbat ho gayi hai
Teri hi teri baatein kare
Tere liye ghar banaau
Deewaarein neele rang se sajaau
Pasand hai tumhe, maloom hai
Tumne bataya tha ek dafe

Dekh shayar bana tere liye
Nagma likha tere liye
Mai khuda me maanu kyun
Tu khuda mere liye

snippet.title: Uniq Poet - Overdue ft. MC Flo
snippet.description:
Artists: Uniq Poet ft. MC Flo
Written by: Uniq Poet & MC Flo
Produced by: Mr. Yoshi (MPC Live 2 & Suno)
Co-Produced, Mixed & Mastered by: Kpass

About the Track
"Overdue" is a collaboration between Uniq Poet and MC Flo, blending lyricism with a soulful, melodic foundation. Produced on the MPC Live 2 with vocal enhancements via Suno, the track represents Uniq Poet and MC Floâ€™s mindset as they traverse through a life where music is a constant battle between internal pressure and external expectation. It serves as a candid reflection on the feeling of having fallen short for the listeners, capturing the moment an artist faces their own perceived delays. MC Flo, a long-standing inspiration and peer on this shared path, enters with a verse that serves as a catalyst, injecting the "can-do" mentality needed to break the silence and pull the narrative back into the light.

â€œEvery line I write is a dedication long overdue!â€‌

    Mayalu Kata chha ( Huri Batas)

â™¬ Vocal:- 
Sagar Ale Magar  @SagarAle  
Melina Rai  @melinaraiofficial  
Milan Gurung

â™¬ Mixing | Mastering:- 
Aakash Nepali  

â™¬ Studio:- 
Sky Music

â™¬ Audio | Video:- 
Milan Gurung Official

-------------------------------------------
Lyrics : 

1, Shoka chhani Timrai saath Pauni
  Sangai Akhaa judhaudai Nidauni

2, Paye bhane mailanthe  chorera
Rati AAi  jhyaal dhoka forera

3, samjhepachhi  message ra call gara 
  maya gatho parnalai balgara
 
4, Timlai bhetna napako jhokama 
  photo taasi  rakham ki chok ma

5,man lagdaina kohi sanga bolna 
  timro yaadle chhodena man polna 

6, mutu jhiki dim jasto bhako chha 
  kaha dekham ra kaha bhetam bhako chha 

7,  matoko ghar  khusiko  chhano 
  tadhaa huda mutumai bhakkano

8, Timro jobaan Deu mmero haatma 
   Barbarauna  thalechhu  raatma 

9, Hunna maaya rupranga  Oth heri 
   Hasi hasi dinchhu ki chot feri 

10, kasle bhanchha chhutida Attinna 
  Yaad le  jati raksile maatinna..

Huri batasa  mayalu kata chha lagchha hatasa , mayalu kata chha lagchha Atyas...

snippet.title: Zaalima - Arijit Singh | Shah Rukh Khan | Raees | Harshdeep Kaur | Valentineâ€™s Special Love Song
snippet.description:
ًں‘‰ًںڈ» SUBSCRIBE to Bollywood Chartbusters - https://bit.ly/3Y1MW0B

Song - Zaalima
Music - JAM8
Lyrics - Amitabh Bhattacharya
Singers - Arijit Singh and Harshdeep Kaur
Choreography - Bosco- Caesar

Written by - Rahul Dholakia, Harit Mehta, Ashish Vashi & Niraj Shukla
Director Of Photography - K.U Mohanan ISC
Produced By - Ritesh Sidhwani, Gauri Khan & Farhan Akhtar
Directed By - Rahul Dholakia

Sound Design:- Dj Phukan, Sunny M.R.
Programmers:- Sourav Roy, Dj Phukan, Sunny M.R., Rohan Chauhan, Arijit Singh
Mix & Master:- Shadab Rayeen @ Newedge
Assistant:- Abhishek Sortey
Shoot Mix:- Ashwin Kulkarni
Recording Engineers:- Ashwin Kulkarni, Himanshu Shirlekar, Aaroh Velankar, Kaushik Das
Vocal Conductor:- Akashdeep Sengupta, Kaushik Das, Tushar Joshi

Musicians:-
Drums:- Alan Hertz
Bass:- Ernest Tibbs
Duff:- Iqbal Azad
Harmonium:- Feroz Shaikh
Acoustic Guitars:- Pawan Rasaily and Arijit Singh
Electric Guitars:- Pawan Rasaily 

Lyrics:
Jo Teri Khatir Tadpe Pehle Se Hi
Kya Usey Tadpana O Zaalima, O Zaalima
Jo Tere Ishq Mein Behka Pehle Se Hi
Kya Usey Behkana O Zaalima, O Zaalima

Aankhen Marhaba, Baatein Marhaba
Main Sau Martaba Deewana Huaa
Mera Na Raha Jab Se Dil Mera
Tere Husn Ka Nishana Hua

Jiski Har Dhadkan Tu Ho
Aise Dil Ko Kya Dhadkana
O Zaalima, O Zaalima

Saanson Mein Teri Nazdeeqiyon Ka
Itrr Tu Ghol De, Ghol Deâ€¦
Main Hi Kyun Ishq Zaahir Karun
Tu Bhi Kabhi Bol De, Bol Deâ€¦

Leke Jaan Hi Jaayega Meri
Qaatil Har Tera Bahaana Hua
Tujhse Hi Shuru
Tujhpe Hi Khatam
Mere Pyaar Ka Fasaana Hua

Tu Shamma Hai Toh Yaad Rakhna
Main Bhi Hoon Parwaana
O Zaalima, O Zaalima..

Deedaar Tera Milne Ke Baad Hi
Chhoote Meri Angdaayi
Tu Hi Bata De Kyun Zaalima Main Kehlayi..

#RaeesSongs #ShahRukhKhanSongs #ArijitSinghSongs #valentinesday #romanticsong #zaalima

snippet.title: Spending $8,582,495 To Build The TALLEST WATER SLIDE In Roblox..
snippet.description:
Today I built the tallest waterslide in Roblox! Make sure you watch the whole video to find out what happens.

Merch: https://foltyn.shop/

Join this channel to get access to perks:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCRkuUgtDAL4XSU5jB40J_wA/join

--Socials--

Discord: https://discord.gg/hqwZhrkqRr

Roblox Group: https://www.roblox.com/groups/11775558/Foltyns-Family#!/about

Roblox Name: TheRealFoltyn

Insta: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. Itâ€™s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX â€” interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything â€” be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer â€œCapture the Flagâ€‌ game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (â€œRobuxâ€‌). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

#Roblox #foltyn

id.title: Menghabiskan $8.582.495 untuk Membangun Seluncuran Air Tertinggi di Roblox..
id.description:
Hari ini aku membangun seluncuran air tertinggi di Roblox! Pastikan kalian menonton seluruh video untuk mengetahui apa yang terjadi.

Merchandise: https://foltyn.shop/

Gabung ke saluran ini untuk mendapatkan akses ke keuntungan:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCRkuUgtDAL4XSU5jB40J_wA/join

--Media Sosial--

Discord: https://discord.gg/hqwZhrkqRr

Grup Roblox: https://www.roblox.com/groups/11775558/Foltyns-Family#!/about

Nama Roblox: TheRealFoltyn

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

Apa itu Roblox? ROBLOX adalah taman bermain dan bengkel virtual online, tempat anak-anak dari segala usia dapat berinteraksi, berkreasi, bersenang-senang, dan belajar dengan aman. ROBLOX unik karena hampir semua hal di dalamnya dirancang dan dibangun oleh anggota komunitas. ROBLOX dirancang untuk usia 13 hingga 18 tahun, tetapi terbuka untuk semua usia. Setiap pemain memulai dengan memilih avatar dan memberinya identitas. Mereka kemudian dapat menjelajahi ROBLOX â€” berinteraksi dengan orang lain melalui obrolan, bermain game, atau berkolaborasi dalam proyek kreatif. Setiap pemain juga diberikan sebidang lahan virtual yang belum dikembangkan beserta kotak peralatan virtual untuk mendesain dan membangun apa pun â€” baik itu gedung pencakar langit yang dapat dijelajahi, helikopter yang berfungsi, mesin pinball raksasa, game "Capture the Flag" multipemain, atau kreasi lain yang belum terbayangkan. Tidak ada biaya untuk lahan virtual pertama ini. Dengan berpartisipasi dan membangun hal-hal keren, anggota ROBLOX dapat memperoleh lencana khusus serta mata uang ROBLOX ("Robux"). Sebagai gantinya, mereka dapat berbelanja di katalog online untuk membeli pakaian dan aksesori avatar serta bahan bangunan premium, komponen interaktif, dan mekanisme yang berfungsi.

#Roblox #foltyn

Iga jadthiyyaley | Jumbalikay aaya sher |

Hey aa daar kaa sulthaane
Maa ghar kaa saithaane
Chal shikaar jeyya | Jumbalikay aaya sher |

Pacha bottu gaayamidhi | Aaya sher |
Gunjukuney nyayamidhi | Aaya sher |
Boodidhala gadda idhi | Aaya sher |
Maatho raayabadda kadhe idhi | Aaya sher |

Jadaluro jadaluro hadaluro dhadaluro
Kodutharo thodaluro theestharo tholuro
Savaariki doruku biddaa
Sevaaley lesthayi biddaa

Pegul dheesi medala yesi
Aadutham biddaa, aadutham biddaa

CHARANAM

Aada eeda yeda joodu biddaa
Vanukay puttalinka paditheynay naa needa
Bondha pedutha maliknaina gooda
Vaani saavu raasukochina devuni kaada

Chal udukuthundhi saraa battilo maa kanta thade
| Jumbalikay aaya aaya sher |

Iga raaluthadhi bottu bottulo nee panche thade
| Jumbalikay aaya aaya sher |

Aadutham biddaa, aadutham biddaa

SECOND PALLAVI

Bar baadhey ayinonraa
Nannu peekuthava | Jumbalikay aaya sher |

Hey moldhaaram lenoniraa
Nee kanaa mondonraa

snippet.title: ROBLOX BUILD STAIRS FOR BRAINROTS..
snippet.description:
Today, I had to build stairs to try and get the rarest brainrot. Make sure you watch the whole video to find out what happens. 

FOLTYN MERCH: https://foltyn.shop/

--Socials--

Discord: https://discord.gg/hqwZhrkqRr

Roblox Group: https://www.roblox.com/groups/1177555...

Roblox Name: TheRealFoltyn

Insta: https://www.instagram.com/foltynn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. Itâ€™s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX â€” interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything â€” be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer â€œCapture the Flagâ€‌ game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (â€œRobuxâ€‌). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

en.title: ROBLOX BUILD STAIRS FOR BRAINROTS..

Today, I had to build stairs to try and get the rarest brainrot. Make sure you watch the whole video to find out what happens.

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. Itâ€™s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX â€” interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything â€” be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer â€œCapture the Flagâ€‌ game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (â€œRobuxâ€‌). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

Em seguida, pode explorar o ROBLOX â€” interagindo com outros jogadores por meio de bate-papo, jogos ou colaborando em projetos criativos. Cada jogador tambأ©m recebe seu prأ³prio terreno virtual nأ£o desenvolvido, juntamente com uma caixa de ferramentas virtual para projetar e construir qualquer coisa â€” seja um arranha-cأ©u navegأ،vel, um helicأ³ptero funcional, uma mأ،quina de pinball gigante, um jogo multiplayer de "Capture a Bandeira" ou alguma outra criaأ§أ£o ainda nأ£o imaginada. id.title: ROBLOX MEMBANGUN TANGGA UNTUK BRAINROTS..
id.description:
Hari ini, aku harus membangun tangga untuk mencoba mendapatkan brainrot terlangka. Pastikan kalian menonton seluruh video untuk mengetahui apa yang terjadi.

MERCH FOLTYN: https://foltyn.shop/

--Media Sosial--

Discord: https://discord.gg/hqwZhrkqRr

Grup Roblox: https://www.roblox.com/groups/1177555...

Nama Roblox: TheRealFoltyn

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/foltynn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

Apa itu Roblox? ROBLOX adalah taman bermain dan bengkel virtual online, tempat anak-anak dari segala usia dapat berinteraksi, berkreasi, bersenang-senang, dan belajar dengan aman. Keunikannya terletak pada hampir semua hal di ROBLOX dirancang dan dibangun oleh anggota komunitas. ROBLOX dirancang untuk usia 13 hingga 18 tahun, tetapi terbuka untuk semua usia. Setiap pemain memulai dengan memilih avatar dan memberinya identitas. Mereka kemudian dapat menjelajahi ROBLOX â€” berinteraksi dengan orang lain melalui obrolan, bermain game, atau berkolaborasi dalam proyek kreatif. Setiap pemain juga diberikan sebidang lahan virtual yang belum dikembangkan beserta kotak peralatan virtual untuk mendesain dan membangun apa pun â€” baik itu gedung pencakar langit yang dapat dijelajahi, helikopter yang berfungsi, mesin pinball raksasa, game "Capture the Flag" multipemain, atau kreasi lain yang belum terbayangkan. Tidak ada biaya untuk lahan virtual pertama ini. Dengan berpartisipasi dan membangun hal-hal keren, anggota ROBLOX dapat memperoleh lencana khusus serta mata uang ROBLOX ("Robux"). Sebagai gantinya, mereka dapat berbelanja di katalog online untuk membeli pakaian dan aksesori avatar serta bahan bangunan premium, komponen interaktif, dan mekanisme yang berfungsi.

Franklin Opens Most HAUNTED Mystery Containers In Indian Bike Driving 3D! ًںک±

This video is about the Indian Bike Driving 3D game, this is a horror scary story about Mystery Container or Mystery Box In Indian Bike Driving 3D. In this scary story, Franklin meets many ghosts and monsters like Granny, Mr. Meat, Choo Choo Charles, Maya Ek Pisachini, and Scary Teacher. To unlock his own mystery container in Indian Bike Driving 3D, Franklin must invite all these ghosts. Will Franklin survive this horror adventure? What is inside the mystery box of franklin of Indian Bike Driving 3D? Watch the full scary story to find out!

snippet.title: PUBGM 141 ULTIMATE GRIND - FT. #4T #HORAA #ASI8 #SCYTES #LF
snippet.description:
Welcome to the PUBGM 141 Ultimate Grind, one of the most exciting PUBG MOBILE competitive tournaments in South Asia.

Pro teams from Pakistan, Bangladesh, Nepal, and Sri Lanka are entering the battleground to compete in an intense multi day competition filled with strategy, rotations, and high pressure fights.

Over four days of action, squads will battle through multiple matches where every elimination, every rotation, and every decision can change the leaderboard.

Expect clutch moments, aggressive pushes, and high level PUBG MOBILE gameplay as teams fight to prove themselves on the battlefield.

Only one team will rise above the rest and become the Ultimate Grind Champion.

The grind begins now.
